case_title: FELICITO CORTEZ VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 1/15/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF NEW EVIDENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT FELICITO CORTEZ ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CORTEZ, FELICITO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORTEZ, FELICITO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,490.96 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,540.96, PLAINTIFF HAS CARRIED HIS BURDEN OF PROVING A SUDDEN STOP, WHICH CAUSED HIM SUFFICIENT PAIN TO REQUIRE EMERGENCY MEDICAL ATTENTION. HE SEEKS ONLY THE REMAINING BALANCE ON HIS MEDICAL BILLS FROM ZSFGH AND SFGH MEDICAL GROUP. I AWARD HIM THOSE AMOUNTS PLUS $50 GENERAL DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,946.20 FILED BY CORTEZ, FELICITO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CORTEZ, FELICITO
